perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action video. A young woman in a white sweatshirt is shown in a tight shot, frantically pounding on a small yogurt cup with a spoon at a wooden desk. (2) She stops, resting her head on her hand while looking at her laptop with an expression of deep annoyance and boredom. (3) She shifts to rummaging through desk drawers, tossing items out in a fit of frustration. (4) Transition to a brighter scene: the same woman appears in a yellow button-down shirt with pigtails, now smiling and holding a large container of Matthew's Choice yogurt. (5) Close-up shots show the white yogurt being scooped into a glass bowl and topped with granola and dried fruit. (6) She is then seen holding and drinking from multiple colorful 'Yogurt to Go' bottles, looking refreshed and happy. (7) She gestures toward the products and then points downward to the bottom of the frame while smiling at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with sharp, rhythmic tapping sounds of a spoon hitting a cup, accompanied by a female voice sounding frustrated and complaining. (2) Tension-building SFX play as she rummages through drawers, culminating in a short 'explosion' sound effect. (3) Upbeat, energetic electronic pop music with a fast tempo enters as the product is introduced. (4) A female voice speaks in a bright, enthusiastic promotional tone, describing the yogurt's taste. (5) A deep, professional male voice-over joins, detailing the probiotic count and health benefits. (6) Sound effects like 'ding' and 'sparkle' accompany text appearances. (7) The music continues at a steady volume until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: '烦' (Annoyed), '躁' (Restless), '气' (Angry) - Large red characters appearing with a fire-like background to emphasize frustration. (2) Functional: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese reflecting the dialogue about being an 'employer' who doesn't want to work. (3) Functional: '馬修嚴選 G+ 優格' (Matthew's Choice G+ Yogurt) - Product name identifying the brand. (4) Decorative: '口感細緻柔滑 奶香味濃郁' (Fine and smooth texture, rich milky aroma) - Highlighting product features. (5) Decorative: '100億隻以上 活性乳酸菌' (Over 10 billion active lactic acid bacteria) - Scientific health claim. (6) Hook: '快到我首頁 把團購優惠連結點起來' (Go to my homepage and click the group buy link) - Call to action at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Problem (Frustration at work) -> Solution (Yogurt discovery) -> Benefit demonstration -> Call to action.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator appearing in different outfits throughout.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, initially wearing a white graphic hoodie, later wearing a yellow short-sleeved shirt with her hair in pigtails.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern indoor space with white cabinets, a desk, a laptop, and some character figurines/toys in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a commercial endorsement for Matthew's Choice yogurt. It uses a relatable narrative of workplace stress and burnout to position the yogurt as a refreshing, healthy solution that boosts both mood and physical well-being (digestion). It targets busy professionals and students looking for convenient health snacks.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of product packaging, demonstration of consumption, detailed explanation of health benefits, and a clear call to action for a group purchase.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy personality shift from 'stressed worker' to 'happy consumer'.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes popular 'short-form' editing tropes like rapid cuts, expressive text overlays, and a problem-solution narrative structure typical of social media marketing in East Asia.
